{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323012911B9CB98CBE27F24C74399\"}"},"total":670},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7098140040366523167","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是很多游戏电影和小说的鼻祖啊 ～分数还没叮来叮去的系统文还有靠背元素周期表惊呆古代人的穿书分数高人气火～…[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652664629,"group_id":"7051567692964170766","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOJYCdrN5KR3H2PiF14uA8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4f3834c5185a433e98a7a5d159965a41~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792513\u0026x-signature=%2Bc4phuvFz5qW5DQ3CX1yfxc1cc0%3D","user_id":"751688757813612","user_name":"西瓜大将军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"751688757813612","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1659147567,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7051567692964170766","book_info":{"abstract":"“克苏鲁神话”是世界科幻、奇幻、恐怖文学史上瑰宝，由一系列短篇小说所组成的小说体系。它是世界现代神话的代表，与《魔戒》、《冰与火之歌》所代表的古代神话是二分天下的欧美两大神话体系，与阿西莫夫的“银河帝国”在科幻界分庭抗礼。 游戏《魔兽世界》《星际争霸》《炉石传说》、科幻影视《奥特曼》《加勒比海盗》《异形》《蝙蝠侠》等都深受克苏鲁神话影响。“克苏鲁神话”在国内热度很高，但由于其文本极为晦涩，不易阅读，因此，我们要打造一版专门介绍什么是克苏鲁神话、神话中诸神由来的画集，以图文结合的形式，为读者提供最轻松易读的图书版本。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/47457a3a6f60e987481faf649f125ee0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"H.P.洛夫克拉夫特","author_id":"","book_id":"7051567692964170766","book_name":"克苏鲁神话：众神典藏图集","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"424.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":397,\"name\":\"外国文学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=397\u0026name=外国文学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7051570943725931528","read_count":"23078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"40903"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"42","tags":"文学经典,外国文学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/47457a3a6f60e987481faf649f125ee0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779384551\u0026x-signature=66WYiXUrOFyzcoDHaKwIWvCafg8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"324947"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323012911B9CB98CBE27F24C74399\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":302,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":705,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":56008},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7406594834917491481","common":{"co on":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7051567692964170766","book_info":{"abstract":"“克苏鲁神话”是世界科幻、奇幻、恐怖文学史上瑰宝，由一系列短篇小说所组成的小说体系。它是世界现代神话的代表，与《魔戒》、《冰与火之歌》所代表的古代神话是二分天下的欧美两大神话体系，与阿西莫夫的“银河帝国”在科幻界分庭抗礼。 游戏《魔兽世界》《星际争霸》《炉石传说》、科幻影视《奥特曼》《加勒比海盗》《异形》《蝙蝠侠》等都深受克苏鲁神话影响。“克苏鲁神话”在国内热度很高，但由于其文本极为晦涩，不易阅读，因此，我们要打造一版专门介绍什么是克苏鲁神话、神话中诸神由来的画集，以图文结合的形式，为读者提供最轻松易读的图书版本。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/47457a3a6f60e987481faf649f125ee0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"H.P.洛夫克拉夫特","author_id":"","book_id":"7051567692964170766","book_name":"克苏鲁神话：众神典藏图集","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"424.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":397,\"name\":\"外国文学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=397\u0026name=外国文学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7051570943725931528","read_count":"23078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"40903"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"42","tags":"文学经典,外国文学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/47457a3a6f60e987481faf649f125ee0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779384551\u0026x-signature=66WYiXUrOFyzcoDHaKwIWvCafg8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"88"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323012911B9CB98CBE27F24C74399\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7121,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6360},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7261921892960813858","common":{"comment_type":
